channel.title: Our Coaching Team on Grand Ledge Archery
channel.description: Recent content in Our Coaching Team on Grand Ledge Archery

item.title: Sarah Martinez
item.description: Sarah Martinez Head Coach & Program Director Sarah has been the cornerstone of Grand Ledge Archery for over 15 years. She joined the program as a junior archer and worked her way up through every level of the sport before taking the helm as Head Coach. Under her leadership, Grand Ledge Archery has become one of Michigan’s most respected scholastic programs. Achievements 2018 National Indoor Champion — Recurve 3x Michigan State Champion (2016, 2017, 2018) USA Archery Level 4 Certified Instructor Olympic Training Center coaching certification Coached 12 individual state champions at Grand Ledge Specialties Recurve technique and form refinement Mental preparation and competition strategy Youth athlete development Advanced shooting mechanics Coaching Philosophy “Every archer has a unique natural style.

item.title: Mike Thompson
item.description: Mike Thompson Compound Bow Specialist Mike brings 20 years of competitive compound archery experience to Grand Ledge. As a former professional archer who competed at the world level, he understands what it takes to perform under pressure — and how to teach those skills to the next generation. Achievements 2015 World Field Archery Champion 5x National Field Champion Professional Archery Association (PAA) member USA Archery Level 3 Certified Instructor Equipment tuning specialist — certified by multiple bow manufacturers Specialties Compound bow setup, tuning, and customization Field archery and 3D target shooting Equipment selection for competitive archers Mental game and pre-competition routines Coaching Philosophy “Precision is the product of understanding — understanding your equipment, your body, and your mind.

item.title: Jenny Kim
item.description: Jenny Kim Youth Program Coordinator Jenny is the heart of Grand Ledge Archery’s youth development pipeline. Her patient, encouraging teaching style has introduced hundreds of young people in the Grand Ledge community to the sport — many of whom have gone on to compete at the state and national level. Achievements USA Archery Level 3 Certified Instructor Youth Program Development certification Former collegiate archer — Michigan State University 10+ years of youth coaching experience Developed Grand Ledge’s award-winning beginner curriculum Specialties Beginning archery instruction (ages 8 and up) Youth range safety and protocols Parent-child archery programs School partnership and camp programs Coaching Philosophy “Archery is one of the few sports where a kid can walk in on day one, follow the steps, and hit the target.
